mapper.select: select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data where museum = #{museum} LIMIT 1,100
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data where cat1 REGEXP #{cat1} LIMIT 100,100
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data where cat2 = #{cat2} LIMIT 200,100
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data where cat3 REGEXP #{cat3} LIMIT 300,100
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data order by object_name asc
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data order by object_name desc
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data order by time_period asc
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data order by time_period desc

select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data where label REGEXP #{str} or medium REGEXP #{str} or object_name REGEXP #{str} or object_type REGEXP #{str} or previous_owner REGEXP #{str} or provenance REGEXP #{str} or time_period REGEXP #{str} or cat1 REGEXP #{str} or cat3 REGEXP #{str} #{str} or makers_name REGEXP #{str} LIMIT 400,100
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data where id != #{id} LIMIT ${start},${end}
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data where museum= #{museum} and id != #{id} LIMIT ${start},${end}
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data where makers_name= #{makers_name} and id != #{id} LIMIT ${start},${end}
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data where cat2= #{cat2} and id != #{id} LIMIT ${start},${end}
select id,object_name,cat1,cat2,cat3,makers_name,img_url from cultural_relics_data where geography= #{geography} and id != #{id} LIMIT ${start},${end}
